notes: Core mechanics present but maze parsing has issues (spaces in maze string create gaps, ghost house logic is buggy with inHouse ghosts drawing at wrong positions), movement feels imprecise due to pixel-based collision rather than proper tile-based snapping, and the maze layout doesn't faithfully reproduce the classic Pac-Man maze.

A solid but clearly imperfect Pac-Man clone: controls and presentation are decent, but several gameplay/authenticity issues remain, including maze/state handling quirks and non-canonical ghost/level behavior.
